title: Limitation of liability clause pattern
legalCaveat: Legal and contract references are advisory issue-spotting context only. They are not legal advice and do not approve, reject, or modify any contract.
tags: low cap for high-impact data processing
summary: Contract clause pattern normalized for Limitation of liability issue spotting.
excerpt: Review question: Does the cap exclude confidentiality, data breach, IP infringement, fraud, gross negligence, willful misconduct, regulatory fines, or indemnity obligations? Review question: Is the cap tied to fees paid in a defined lookback period? Review question: Does the clause conflict with mandatory insurance or indemnity obligations? Risk signal: uncapped operational exposure Risk signal: ambiguous excluded losses Risk signal: low cap for high-impact data processing

title: Indemnification clause pattern
legalCaveat: Legal and contract references are advisory issue-spotting context only. They are not legal advice and do not approve, reject, or modify any contract.
summary: Contract clause pattern normalized for Indemnification issue spotting.
excerpt: Review question: Who controls defense and settlement? Review question: Are data breach, confidentiality, sanctions/export, IP, and employment claims covered? Review question: Are notice and cooperation obligations practical for incident response timelines? Risk signal: one-way indemnity Risk signal: missing data/security indemnity Risk signal: settlement control without customer consent

title: Governing law and forum clause pattern
legalCaveat: Legal and contract references are advisory issue-spotting context only. They are not legal advice and do not approve, reject, or modify any contract.
summary: Contract clause pattern normalized for Governing law and forum issue spotting.
excerpt: Review question: Does the chosen law/forum align with the customer operating jurisdiction and enforcement needs? Review question: Does the dispute mechanism conflict with regulatory reporting or injunction needs? Review question: Are emergency remedies preserved for confidentiality, IP, and data misuse? Risk signal: unfamiliar forum Risk signal: no injunctive relief carveout Risk signal: unclear dispute escalation path

title: Confidentiality and data security clause pattern
legalCaveat: Legal and contract references are advisory issue-spotting context only. They are not legal advice and do not approve, reject, or modify any contract.
tags: subprocessors not bound to equivalent controls
summary: Contract clause pattern normalized for Confidentiality and data security issue spotting.
excerpt: Review question: Does confidentiality survive termination for an appropriate period? Review question: Are security controls, incident notice, audit rights, and subcontractor obligations explicit? Review question: Are personal data, customer data, credentials, source code, and regulated records covered? Risk signal: short confidentiality survival Risk signal: no incident notice SLA Risk signal: subprocessors not bound to equivalent controls

title: Termination and exit assistance clause pattern
legalCaveat: Legal and contract references are advisory issue-spotting context only. They are not legal advice and do not approve, reject, or modify any contract.
tags: termination rights too narrow for regulated workflows
summary: Contract clause pattern normalized for Termination and exit assistance issue spotting.
excerpt: Review question: Can the customer terminate for regulatory, security, sanctions, or material control failures? Review question: Is data return/deletion certificated and time-bound? Review question: Is transition support defined for critical services? Risk signal: no exit assistance Risk signal: unclear data deletion Risk signal: termination rights too narrow for regulated workflows
